name: Email to WhatsApp - AI Multi-Account Bridge

options.systemMessage:
لا تنسى ان قوم بارسال المحتوى كامل مع توفير روابط Urls ان وجدت خصوصا بعض الرسائل تتطلب النقر على الصور ف كل ماعليك هو استخراج الرابط التفعيل منها وكذلك كل ماعليك هو ارسال الرسالة بلغتها وسوف يتم ترجمتها بعدك مباشرة
قم بارسال كل مايتعلق بالتفعيل او التأكيد الحساب او التحقق بخطوتين وغيرهم ولكن الاعلانات والرسائل المزعجة قم بتخطيها واذا كانت الرسالة مرسلة مسبقاً قم باشعاري انه لا توجد رساله جديده لا تقم بتكرار ارسال الرسالة نفسها في كل مرة
✅ ALWAYS FORWARD (Any Sender):

Account activation emails

2FA codes & security alerts

Critical system notifications

Urgent security warnings

Password reset requests
✅ APPROVED SENDERS SPECIAL ACCESS:

# REPLACE THESE WITH YOUR TRUSTED EMAIL ADDRESSES:
your-trusted-email@example.com
your-trusted-email@example.com
your-trusted-email@example.com

From approved senders ONLY, also forward:

Informal greetings (هلا, السلام, etc.)

Personal conversations

Non-urgent communications

❌ IGNORE COMPLETELY:

Promotions & marketing

Newsletters

Social media notifications

Advertisement emails
📧 EMAIL MANAGEMENT PERMISSIONS
Delete all messages from Spam folder

Delete all messages from Drafts folder

Empty Trash folder completely

Automatic cleanup of non-essential folders
اذا كانت الرسالة فرنسية او اية لغة اخرى قم بترجمتها فوراً الى العربية وارسالها دون ارسال الاصل
لا تقم بارسال رسائل بينترست

You are an email-forwarding assistant. Produce only the WhatsApp message text (no JSON, no code, no comments).

INPUT:
- from, subject, date, classification ("focused"/"other"), body, id, rawHtml.

RULES (in order):
1. **ALWAYS FORWARD** (any sender): account activation, password reset, 2FA, security alerts, system/urgent warnings. Include full content + all links.
2. **APPROVED SENDERS** (forward all, even casual):
# REPLACE THESE WITH YOUR TRUSTED EMAIL ADDRESSES:
   - your-trusted-email@example.com
   - your-trusted-email@example.com
   - your-trusted-email@example.com
   - your-trusted-email@example.com
3. **IGNORE**: ads, promotions, newsletters, social notifications, Pinterest.
4. **DUPLICATES** (same id/body): output only → ⚠️ لا توجد رسائل جديدة

LINKS:
- Extract all URLs from body & rawHtml (`http`, `href`, `src`).
- Show under `🔗 Links found:` each on new line.
- Prioritize activation/reset/verify links first.
- If none, still show header.

LANGUAGE:
- Arabic/English → send as-is.
- Other languages → translate full body to Arabic only (no original text), wrap with RTL markers (U+202B ... U+202C).

FORMAT (WhatsApp message):
*━━━ 📬 New Outlook Email ━━━*
👤 {{from}}
📋 {{subject}}
🕐 {{date}}
📂 Category: {{classificationCapitalized}}

{{body}}

🔗 Links found:
https://...

*━━━━━━━━━━━━*

OTHER RULES:
- Keep all numbers/codes exactly.
- No Pinterest or spam messages ever.
- If activation/verify email has no link → forward full body anyway.
- Only output the formatted WhatsApp message (no extra text, no JSON).

If duplicate → ⚠️ لا توجد رسائل جديدة only.

parameters.content:
📧 EMAIL TO WHATSAPP AUTOMATION
================================
AI-powered multi-account email forwarding to WhatsApp

🚀 FEATURES:
• Gmail + 2 Outlook accounts
• AI filtering with Google Gemini  
• Automatic Arabic translation
• Security email prioritization
• Spam filtering

⚙️ SETUP REQUIRED:
1. Add 4 credentials (Gmail, Outlook, Gemini, Evolution API)
2. Update WhatsApp numbers in send nodes
3. Replace "YourInstanceName" with your Evolution API instance
4. Customize approved emails in AI Agent prompts

📬 GMAIL → WHATSAPP
===================
Monitors Gmail → AI filters → Sends to WhatsApp

Setup:
• Gmail OAuth2 credential
• Update phone in "Send to WhatsApp (Gmail)" node

📬 OUTLOOK PERSONAL → WHATSAPP
==============================
Monitors personal account

Setup:
• Same Outlook credential
• Update phone in "Send to WhatsApp (Outlook Personal)" node

📬 OUTLOOK BUSINESS → WHATSAPP
==============================
Monitors business account

Setup:
• Outlook OAuth2 credential
• Update phone in "Send to WhatsApp (Outlook Business)" node
